nasb.text: Then he said, “Listen now, O house of David! Is it too slight a thing for you to try the patience of men, that you will try the patience of my God as well?

esv.text: And he said, “Hear then, O house of David! Is it too little for you to weary men, that you weary my God also?

cnv.text: 以賽亞說：“大衛家啊，你們要聽！你們使人厭煩還算小事，還要使我的　神厭煩嗎？

ccb.text: 以赛亚说：“大卫的子孙啊，你们听着！你们使人厌烦还不够吗？还要使我的上帝厌烦吗？

csbs.text: 于是以赛亚说：“大卫家啊，你们要听！难道你们使人厌倦还不够，又要使我的神厌倦吗？
